s9-db.notes: Done - proven on real Postgres 18 (2026-06-30): isolation, doors locked, idempotent provision, clean teardown.

s3-upload.notes: Pending - testable WITHOUT Docker (wrangler + free Cloudflare account + a static test folder). The one remaining no-Docker spike.

m1-postgres.notes: Done - siteagent_platform DB + siteagent_admin role created locally (2026-06-30).

m1-registry.notes: Pending - control-plane schema (siteagent_control) + migrations. Buildable now WITHOUT Docker.

m1-compose.notes: Pending - per-tenant compose template; finalize after the Instatic schema spike.

m2-schema-role.notes: Done - idempotent mint SQL proven (CREATE ROLE guard + CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS + ALTER ROLE search_path).

m2-cf.notes: Pending - Cloudflare Pages project creation (namespaced); gated by m1-registry.

m2-saga.notes: Pending - provisioning state machine + walk-back cleanup; gated by m2-firstrun/m2-cf.

m2-deprovision.notes: In progress - drop schema/role SQL proven; container + tenants/<slug>/ teardown still to build.

m3-token.notes: Pending - signed per-tenant token; gated by m3-proxy.

m3-rate.notes: Pending - per-tenant rate guard; gated by m3-proxy.

m3-meter.notes: Pending - usage metering to Registry; gated by m3-proxy + m1-registry.

m4-watch.notes: Pending - complete-bake detection; gated by s1-assets (BLOCKED: Docker).

m4-deploy.notes: Pending - wrangler Direct Upload; gated by s3-upload + m4-watch.

m4-record.notes: Pending - record deploy + live URL; gated by m4-deploy + m1-registry.

m4-domains.notes: Pending - custom domains (CF API + DNS); gated by m4-deploy.

m5-settings.notes: Pending - OpenRouter + Cloudflare creds (encrypted); buildable after m1-registry.

m5-tenants.notes: Pending - Add Tenant flow + share link; gated by m2-saga.

m5-dash.notes: Pending - usage/health dashboards; gated by m7-metrics.

m5-alerts.notes: Pending - failure alerts; gated by m1-registry.

m6-roles.notes: Pending - Tenant Admin + custom toggle roles; gated by m2-firstrun.

m6-audit.notes: Pending - per-user audit log; gated by m2-firstrun.

m7-metrics.notes: Pending - metrics collector + time series; gated by m1-registry.

m8-upgrade.notes: Pending - fleet upgrade (sequential rolling restart); gated by m2-saga.

m8-backup.notes: Pending - backup/restore (pg_dump -n + uploads); gated by m2-saga.

m9-vps.notes: Pending - production VPS (Linode) + Docker; gated by m5-tenants.

m9-proxy.notes: Pending - Caddy/Traefik editing-domain TLS; gated by m9-vps.

m9-secrets.notes: Pending - secrets manager (replace plaintext-on-host); gated by m5-settings.
